items.title: They Think They’re Helping… and It’s Actually Adorable
items.description: This kids gardening tool set turns backyard time into a real family activity. Perfect for spring play, little helpers, and outdoor learning.

items.title: Backyard Hack Parents Swear By
items.description: A colorful gardening set that gives kids their own tools, wheelbarrow, and watering can for outdoor play that feels useful and fun.

items.title: Turns Any Yard Into a Splash Zone
items.description: This toddler splash pad makes backyard play easy, fun, and fast. Great for hot days, summer play, and keeping little kids busy outside.

items.title: Safe Water Play for Little Ones
items.description: A shallow splash pad that gives toddlers safe water play with parent-friendly peace of mind. No pool, no drama, just summer fun.
